channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Exclusive: Index Ventures backs Frame’s $50 million bet that employees are still cybersecurity’s weakest link
item.description: The startup uses AI-generated simulations to train employees against the fast-growing wave of deepfake and impersonation attacks targeting enterprises...

item.title: This upstart stablecoin bank just won a rare OCC charter and raised $40 million. Its CEO is only 25
item.description: Augustus wants to remake the correspondent banking system with code and AI.

item.title: The next test of leadership is how well you manage your AI agents
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Forget the Rust Belt or the Sun Belt. The ‘Wired Belt’ may be the next frontier of American political power
item.description: AI automation may be the catalyst for a white-collar suburban revolt.
